ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component (e.g., Sensor, Capacitor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component and its usage */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of the component (e.g., digital, analog, mixed-signal) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the component */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the component */,
  "datasheet_url" TEXT /* URL to the component's datasheet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, product manager, QA) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parameter being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user reviewing the parameter */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was conducted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes from the reviewer */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was approved or rejected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parameter associated with the comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* The text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* The date when the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent comment (for threaded discussions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parameter modified */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., updated, deleted) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the modified parameter */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the modified parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component this label belongs to */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label (e.g., 'high-power', 'low-noise') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_labels_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parameter this tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag (e.g., 'critical', 'non-critical') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)
